channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Alex Eala Advances to Wimbledon Round of 16 After Defeating Iga Swiatek
item.description: Philippine tennis star Alex Eala made history by defeating reigning Wimbledon champion Iga Swiatek in a thrilling third-round match at the 2026 Wimbledon Championships. The 21-year-old Eala, who had p...

item.title: Stephen Miller faces backlash after attributing Trump’s presidency to divine providence
item.description: White House Deputy Chief of Staff Stephen Miller sparked widespread criticism after posting comments praising President Donald Trump in religious terms. In a message shared on the social media platfor...

item.title: Taylor Swift's Wedding Sparks Debate as Potential Mega-Event Outshines Met Gala
item.description: The article discusses the unprecedented scale and grandeur of Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce's wedding, which has surpassed traditional high-profile events like the Met Gala in terms of media attention...

item.title: Mayor Apologizes for Racist Comments on Indigenous Evacuees
item.description: Over 1,100 residents from Kashechewan First Nation, displaced due to water infrastructure failures in January 2026, have been staying in hotel rooms in Niagara Falls, Ontario. Recent controversy erupt...

item.title: Mamelodi Sundowns secure Siyanda Ndlovu transfer as Chiefs target Renaldo Leaner
item.description: Mamelodi Sundowns have finalized the signing of Siyanda Ndlovu from Orlando Pirates, securing the attacking midfielder after a last-minute twist in the transfer saga. Ndlovu, 25, was initially linked ...

item.title: Reduced Sitting Improves Insulin Sensitivity in Postmenopausal Women
item.description: A study published in Diabetologia (2021) investigated the effects of reducing sedentary behavior on metabolic health in postmenopausal women. The research found that minimizing prolonged sitting perio...

item.title: Midjourney Seeks Transparency from Hollywood Studios Over AI Usage
item.description: Midjourney, an AI startup, is engaged in a legal dispute with three major Hollywood studios—Disney, Universal, and Warner Bros.—over allegations of copyright infringement. The conflict began when thes...

item.title: Biffy Clyro Collaborate with Jamie Campbell Bower During Finsbury Park Concert
item.description: Biffy Clyro delivered a historic performance at Finsbury Park, marking their biggest headline show to date. The Scottish band invited 'Stranger Things' actor Jamie Campbell Bower to join them onstage ...

item.title: Canada's Ambitious Nuclear Expansion Strategy Faces Financial and Logistical Challenges

item.title: Jamie Vardy's injury status and potential return for Leicester City match

item.title: Punjab CM Maryam Nawaz Distributes Free Land Allotment Letters to Homeless Families in Jhelum
item.description: Over 600 citizens in Jhelum received free land allotment letters under Punjab Chief Minister Maryam Nawaz Sharif’s 'Apni Zameen Apna Ghar' initiative. Minister Bilal Azhar Kiyani distributed the lette...

item.title: Super Typhoon Bavi Strengthens Outside Philippine Area of Responsibility
item.description: Super Typhoon Bavi continues to intensify outside the Philippine Area of Responsibility (PAR) as of July 4, 2026. According to PAGASA, the typhoon's maximum sustained winds have reached 205 km/h with ...
